item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-026","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The response correctly treats human approval as a hard workflow/backend constraint rather than a prompt tweak, narrows the agent's role to eligibility assessment/submission, and requires traceable approval evidence before any refund commitment can be sent. It also adds state gating, policy checks, and audit logging, directly satisfying the WAE-style control allocation criteria."}
